top_opportunities.thesis: Raytheon's last print beat on margins but the stock drifted sideways. Defense backlog growth not yet reflected in multiples.
top_opportunities.trigger_data_point: Q1 EPS beat by 8%, revenue in-line, guide raised
top_opportunities.why_retail_is_missing_this: Defense stocks lag tech narrative in social feeds; margin expansion is not a meme.
top_opportunities.risk_flags: Budget continuing resolution risk; FX headwinds in 2H.
